response.justification: Bogdan is a well-rounded generalist with 15+ years of experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure work, and has demonstrated strong engineering fundamentals including TDD, CI/CD, and scale systems. However, the Principal Growth/Experimentation role demands deep, specialized experience in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, and statistical analysis — none of which appear meaningfully in the resume. His current seniority ceiling (Staff SWE) and the absence of any growth-engineering or measurement-platform work make him a poor fit for an IC6 role with ownership of company-wide experimentation strategy.
strengths: Broad multi-language experience (TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, DLang) and demonstrated production-scale systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at Naver aligns with the company's AI-first positioning
Consistent track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and community involvement (workshops, open-source projects, conference talks)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management — the core competency of this role
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership or data-driven growth engineering at any employer
Current level is Staff SWE, not Principal/IC6; resume lacks cross-org influence, multi-team initiative ownership, or the strategic scope expected at this seniority

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and metrics infrastructure background
Production scale and AI tooling relevance
